MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMAN B. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-12-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
#1-JUDGE WICK; P. LEE, CLERK - C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT. CASE SETTLED NOT ON RECORD. JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACE, COTIES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 411 O'FARRELL ST, #404 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL OCT-04-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY TO 5PM ON 10-4-94, EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATTY FEE PLT WAIVES ALL BACK RENTS & DAMAGES. IF DEFAULT, PLT WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR $375 OF BACK RENT, $12.50/DAY RENT FROM 8-29-94 TO 10-4-94, $80 COSTS. BOTH PARTIES WAIVES ANY CLAIMS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
